description: Checklist for L1/L2/external-system queues, native token receive handlers, batch operation processing, and domain-specific balances.
core_invariants: the protocol must validate balances in the domain where assets actually reside
queues must be bounded, resumable, and economically resistant to spam
system settlement transfers must not be confused with user deposits
common_bug_classes: local balance check for external-domain funds
withdrawal/deposit not netted before external operation
cancelWithdrawal fails to restore buffer/pending queue
check_items: Map every state variable to asset location and lifecycle stage
Test receive() with system settlement sender vs user sender
Check batch size, resume index, and queue deletion behavior
Net deposits/withdrawals before external operation where intended
Cancel queued withdrawal and verify all buckets/queues restored
test_ideas: mock external settlement transfer into receive()
create thousands of tiny queue entries and measure gas
queue withdrawal before loss/slashing then confirm after
cancel withdrawal fulfilled from buffer and inspect pending operations
